minutes.additionalNotesPlaceholder: Further hints, comments or context information...
minutes.editorModeHint: Use visual mode for detailed editing or markdown mode for fast, keyboard-first capture during the meeting.
minutes.markdownLegend:
Markdown shortcuts:
## Topic
- [i] Info entry @userId
- [ ] Task (open)
- [~] Task (in progress)
- [x] Task (completed)
- [!] Task (cancelled)
Optional tags: !high !medium !low, due:YYYY-MM-DD, dur:15, @userA,userB
Indented lines are imported as details.
Use "information:" or "decision:" (also supports "note:") for the last item addition.
minutes.markdownNoTopicsError: Markdown could not be imported. At least one topic with entries is required.
minutes.plannedDurationHint: Optional: duration per item for session planning.
